mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CVPL C WHERE C.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}
AND C.CVPL_STTS_CD IN ('APLY', 'POCS')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESIDENT_RQST RR WHERE RR.APRV_DT IS NULL AND RR.RJCT_RSN_CN IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY FCH INNER JOIN FACILITY F ON FCH.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND NVL(FCH.USE_RESTRICT_YN, 'N') = 'Y' AND FCH.USE_RESTRICT_BGNG_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 8 AND FCH.USE_RESTRICT_END_DT > SYSDATE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BILL B INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON B.HO_NO = AD.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AD.DONG_NO = AU.DONG_NO WHERE AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM = ( SELECT MAX(B2.BILL_YM) FROM BILL B2 INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD2 ON B2.HO_NO = AD2.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU2 ON AD2.DONG_NO = AU2.DONG_NO WHERE AU2.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B2.BILL_YM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') ) AND B.PYMT_STTS_CD IN ('READY', 'UNPAID', 'OVERDUE')

SELECT B.BILL_YM, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PAID, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD IN ('READY', 'UNPAID') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS UNPAID, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS OVERDUE, NVL(SUM(B.BILL_TOT_AMT), 0) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM BILL B INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON B.HO_NO = AD.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AD.DONG_NO = AU.DONG_NO WHERE AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM = ( SELECT MAX(B2.BILL_YM) FROM BILL B2 INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD2 ON B2.HO_NO = AD2.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU2 ON AD2.DONG_NO = AU2.DONG_NO WHERE AU2.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B2.BILL_YM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') ) GROUP BY B.BILL_YM

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CVPL C WHERE C.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND C.CVPL_REG_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND C.CVPL_REG_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)) AS CVPL_TOTAL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CVPL C WHERE C.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND C.CVPL_STTS_CD IN ('RCPT', 'COMP') AND C.CVPL_REG_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND C.CVPL_REG_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)) AS CVPL_DONE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY FCH INNER JOIN FACILITY F ON FCH.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND FCH.CHK_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND FCH.CHK_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)) AS CHECK_TOTAL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY FCH INNER JOIN FACILITY F ON FCH.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND FCH.CHK_STTS_CD = 'DONE' AND FCH.CHK_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND FCH.CHK_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)) AS CHECK_DONE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESIDENT_RQST RR WHERE RR.RCPT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND RR.RCPT_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)) AS AUTH_TOTAL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESIDENT_RQST RR WHERE (RR.APRV_DT IS NOT NULL OR RR.RJCT_RSN_CN IS NOT NULL) AND RR.RCPT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND RR.RCPT_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)) AS AUTH_DONE FROM DUAL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.CVPL_NO, C.CVPL_TTL AS TTL, AU.DONG_NM || ' ' || AD.HO AS HO_NO, TO_CHAR(C.CVPL_REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DT, C.CVPL_STTS_CD, C.CVPL_PRRT AS PRRT_CD FROM CVPL C LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON C.HO_NO = AD.HO_NO LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AD.DONG_NO = AU.DONG_NO WHERE C.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY C.CVPL_REG_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RR.RQST_NO, M.USER_NM, AU.DONG_NM || ' ' || AD.HO AS HO_NO, RR.RQST_TY_CD AS RQST_TY, TO_CHAR(RR.RCPT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DT, CASE WHEN RR.RJCT_RSN_CN IS NOT NULL THEN 'RJCT' WHEN RR.APRV_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 'APRV' ELSE 'WAIT' END AS RQST_STTS_CD FROM RESIDENT_RQST RR LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON RR.USER_NO = M.USER_NO LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON RR.HO_NO = AD.HO_NO LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AD.DONG_NO = AU.DONG_NO ORDER BY CASE WHEN RR.APRV_DT IS NULL AND RR.RJCT_RSN_CN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, RR.RCPT_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT F.FACILITY_NM, FCH.CHK_TY_CD, TO_CHAR(FCH.CHK_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHK_DT, FCH.CHK_STTS_CD FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY FCH INNER JOIN FACILITY F ON FCH.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND FCH.CHK_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND FCH.CHK_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ORDER BY FCH.CHK_DT DESC, FCH.FAC_CHK_HSTRY_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND TRUNC(FH.RSVT_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD IN ('PENDING','APPROVED')) AS TODAY_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD = 'PENDING') AS PENDING_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' AND FH.RSVT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND FH.RSVT_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7) AS WEEK_APPROVED_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD IN ('REJECTED','CANCELLED','EXPIRED') AND FH.RSVT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND FH.RSVT_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7) AS WEEK_REJECTED_CNT, (SELECT CMN_FACILITY_NM FROM ( SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND FH.RSVT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND FH.RSVT_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) GROUP BY PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS TOP_FACILITY_NM, (SELECT CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND FH.RSVT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND FH.RSVT_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) GROUP BY PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS TOP_FACILITY_CNT FROM DUAL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM, M.USER_NM, OAU.DONG_NM || ' ' || OAD.HO AS HO_NO, TO_CHAR(FH.RSVT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RSVT_DT, TO_CHAR(FH.RSVT_BGNG_DTTM, 'HH24:MI') AS RSVT_BGNG_DTTM, FH.RSVT_STTS_CD FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = FH.USER_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT IHH.USER_NO, IHH.HO_NO, IAU.APT_CMPLEX_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY IHH.USER_NO, IAU.APT_CMPLEX_NO ORDER BY CASE WHEN IHH.HEAD_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, IHH.MOVE_IN_DT DESC NULLS LAST, IHH.HO_NO) AS RN FROM HSHLD_HEAD IHH JOIN APT_DETAIL IAD ON IAD.HO_NO = IHH.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT IAU ON IAU.DONG_NO = IAD.DONG_NO WHERE NVL(IHH.INOUT_CD, 'IN') != 'OUT' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) RHH ON RHH.USER_NO = FH.USER_NO AND RHH.APT_CMPLEX_NO = PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL OAD ON OAD.HO_NO = RHH.HO_NO LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT OAU ON OAU.DONG_NO = OAD.DONG_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY CASE WHEN FH.RSVT_STTS_CD = 'PENDING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, FH.RSVT_DT DESC, FH.RSVT_BGNG_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM, COUNT(*) AS RSVT_COUNT FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND FH.RSVT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND FH.RSVT_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) GROUP BY PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT TO_CHAR(D.DT, 'MM-DD') AS DAY_LABEL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CVPL C WHERE C.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND C.CVPL_STTS_CD IN ('RCPT', 'COMP') AND TRUNC(C.CVPL_REG_DT) = D.DT) AS CVPL_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY FCH INNER JOIN FACILITY F ON FCH.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND FCH.CHK_STTS_CD = 'DONE' AND TRUNC(FCH.CHK_DT) = D.DT) AS CHECK_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESIDENT_RQST RR WHERE (RR.APRV_DT IS NOT NULL OR RR.RJCT_RSN_CN IS NOT NULL) AND TRUNC(NVL(RR.APRV_DT, RR.RCPT_DT)) = D.DT) AS AUTH_CNT FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - LEVEL + 1 AS DT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) D ORDER BY D.DT
